历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 27341 → 85142 → 44106 → 36841 → 49305, with significant fluctuations. In 2022, there was an obvious gap (85142), and from 2023 to 2025, it gradually stabilized in the 40,000–50,000 range; the 2025 baseline is approximately 49305, with the overall ranking shifting backward by about 5200 places in the last three years. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan Province: 2021: 62 → 2022: 53 → 2023: 54 → 2024: 63 → 2025: 66 → 2026: 93. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a significant expansion of about 41%, leading to increased competition pressure, and the ranking number is expected to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has been continuously rising: 2021: 135 → 2022: 125 → 2023: 109 → 2024: 95 → 2025: 86 → 2026: 85. In recent years, the ranking has improved significantly, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in a recruitment announcement that sparked public opinion; the university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, which may slightly affect application confidence. Douyin popularity ranking is 76, rated as average, with moderate exposure. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to agricultural enrollment majors (Plant Protection, Agronomy, Horticulture, etc.), providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have high social popularity/recommendation, matching the large number of engineering majors in the university's 2026 physics category enrollment plan. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 907,000). Based on historical proportions, physics category candidates are estimated to be about 732,000, intensifying competition. Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, and its enrollment in Henan Province is cross-provincial, with no local protection effect. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan is relatively limited, and regional preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two core factors of significant expansion in 2026 (+41%) and a notable increase in physics category candidates in Henan Province (+32%), intensified competition will push rankings backward. However, the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (86→85) provides positive support for application enthusiasm, partially offsetting the impact of expansion. Taking into account the expansion of candidate numbers and the somewhat negative reputation, a limited upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 61909, with a range of 61409–62409.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Guizhou University only offers one medical major in Henan Province, Medical Laboratory Technology. The minimum admission rank in 2023 was 48,276 (planned enrollment of 3), and in 2025 it jumped to 37,473 (planned enrollment of 3), with a significant forward shift of 10,803 places over two years, indicating intensified competition. No separate medical enrollment data for 2021, 2022, and 2024. The 2026 medical enrollment plan remains at 3, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a national key university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Guiyang City, Guizhou Province. It is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. As the only 211 university in the province, it enjoys high recognition in the Southwest region, but its medical disciplines are not traditionally strong, and the overall scale of medical education is relatively small.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has continued to rise. Medical Laboratory Technology, as a clinical auxiliary discipline, has clear career prospects and is favored by candidates. Guizhou University is located in the Southwest, which means studying away from home for Henan candidates, but its 211 status remains attractive. The limited medical enrollment plans within Henan Province have led to increasing competition for cross-provincial medical majors year by year.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the upward trend of historical rankings and the popularity of medical majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for Guizhou University's medical category in Henan Province in 2026 will continue to move forward slightly, with a predicted rank of 37,073, and a fluctuation range of 36,776 to 37,370. The rank is slightly higher than in 2025, reflecting the ongoing competitive trend in medical majors.
